title: Podman fails to install with podman_3.4.2-4_amd64.deb in provo-mirror.opensuse.org
body:
Hi , 


We see their is recent update to the repo in https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_18.04/ and due to that Podman install is broken again. We had seen similar issue last week which was reported through the defect https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/14278 .


```
E: Failed to fetch http://provo-mirror.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_18.04/amd64/podman_3.4.2-4_amd64.deb  File has unexpected size (18660200 != 18684404). Mirror sync in progress? [IP: 91.193.113.70 80]
422   Hashes of expected file:
423    - SHA256:260ac686758f6ed9160b99642ce278d7b175e3f354b31c7b3076653449e53ca4
424    - SHA1:a46da407925b088b8e2f3ec02a83817ce9003cf0 [weak]
425    - MD5Sum:1e98238abb397cbd3b006906ddd9a433 [weak]
426    - Filesize:18684404 [weak]
427E: Unable to fetch some archives, maybe run apt-get update or try with --fix-missing?
```

@lsm5 : Can you take a look at the above error

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out. There is not much @lsm5 could do regarding the OpenSUSE infra. As suggested in https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/14278#issuecomment-1131743956, you can try using a different mirror.
